channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: Oh I see now - it's the same skill, just someone was faster. That's something that should be fixable...
item.description:
Oh I see now - it's the same skill, just someone was faster. That's something that should be fixable.
Just so you know, I absolutely care. The bigger issue is that we simply don't have someone that has time to verify claims and is giving support for it - I'm working on adding process here. In the mean time, can you upload your skill or do you see an error? You should be able to upload it as well, the question is just who owns the non-user slug. And in your case I can see the git history.
The trickier part if if it's (as I assumed before) it's different content witht he same slug name.
--- @steipete | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 25
item.author: @steipete

item.title: @Jason_Young1231 Thanks! What's CC Switch? Something we can do with Hermes? ^_^
item.author: @Teknium

item.title: I really admire the Hermes maintainers’ attitude toward open source.
item.author: @Jason_Young1231

item.title:
the formula to a healthy life is...
1. 8 hours of charts 2. 8 hours of CT 3. 8 hours of sleep
item.description:
